name: Agora ConvoAI Custom LLM Wrapper
description: OpenAI-compatible SSE proxy between Agora ConvoAI and your LLM, with Dify workflow tools.

OPENAI_BASE_URL.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL. Change to your provider's URL for Azure, Groq, Ollama, etc.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: API key for the upstream LLM (e.g. sk-...).

WRAPPER_API_KEY.description: Bearer token protecting /chat/completions. Set this as llm.api_key in Agora ConvoAI. Auto-generated if left blank during deploy.

DIFY_WEATHER_API_KEY.description: Dify API key for the get_current_weather tool (app-…). Add more DIFY_*_API_KEY vars to match your tools.yaml.

DIFY_WEB_SEARCH_API_KEY.description: Dify API key for the web_search tool (app-…). Leave blank to disable this tool.

LOG_LEVEL.description: Log verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, or ERROR.
